data.name: TestInputFile
data.value:
512 80 ';' ;DELWAQ_VERSION_4.910 ; Delwaq version number ;PRINT_OUTPUT_OPTION_9 ; Debug level
; TEMPLATE FILE FOR WATER QUALITY CALCULATION ; First input block 'Water quality calculation' ' ' ' ' INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B1_t0.inc' ; From UI: Time stamp INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B1_sublist.inc' ; From UI: Substance list #1;
;############################################################################### ; Second input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B2_sysclock.inc' ; From UI: System clock INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B2_numsettings.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B2_simtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers 1 ; Monitoring areas in this file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B2_outlocs.inc' ; From UI: Definition of output locations 2 ; No monitoring cross areas INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B2_outputtimers.inc' ; From UI: Simulation timers
#2; ;############################################################################### ; Third input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B3_nrofseg.inc' ; From UI: Nr of segments 2 ; Structure matrix not used 0 ; Features of the computational elements 0
; Volumes from binary files -2 ; No online Flow-WAQ, interpolate Volume 'includes_flow\volume.dat' #3; ;############################################################################### ; Fourth input block INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B4_nrofexch.inc' ; From UI: Nr of exchanges 1 ; Number of dispersion arrays INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B4_dispersion.inc' ; From UI: Dispersion to all substances 0 ; Number of velocity arrays 1 ; Input format of the pointers
-1 ; Pointers from Auxilary file 'includes_deltashell\B4_pointer.inc' ; From UI: Pointers
; START TODO 1 ; Dispersions in this file 1.0 1.0 1.0 ; Scale factors for 3 directions 0 0.0 0.0 ; Values (m2/s) for 3 directions ; END TODO
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B4_dispx.inc' ; From UI: Dispersion(x)
-2 ; No online Flow-WAQ, interpolate Area 'includes_flow\area.dat'
; FLOWS from binary files -2 ; No online Flow-WAQ, interpolate FLOW 'includes_flow\flow.dat'
; Lenght from binary files 1 ; Vary in space 0 ; From binary file 'includes_flow\length.dat'
#4; ;############################################################################### ; Fifth input block, water quality calculation
; Boundary list INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B5_boundlist.inc' ; From UI: Boundary data
0 ; No Tatcher-Harleman time lags
; Boundary data (dummy value) INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B5_bounddata.inc' ; From UI: Boundary data
#5; ;############################################################################### ; Sixth input block, Dry Waste Loads block ; Number of loads (dummy value) 0 ; Number of loads
#6; ;############################################################################### ; Seventh input block
CONSTANTS 'CLOSE_ERR' DATA 1 CONSTANTS 'ONLY_ACTIVE' DATA 0 ; Only active processes CONSTANTS 'Nothreads' DATA 0 ; Multicore CONSTANTS 'Iteration report' DATA 0
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B7_processes.inc' ; From UI: Processes INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B7_meteo.inc' ; From UI: Meteo INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B7_constants.inc' ; From UI: Constants INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B7_functions.inc' ; From UI: Functions INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B7_parameters.inc' ; From UI: Parameters
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Chezy' ALL BINARY_FILE 'includes_flow\chezy.dat'
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Surf' ALL BINARY_FILE 'includes_flow\surface.dat'
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Velocity' ALL BINARY_FILE 'includes_flow\velocity.dat'
SEG_FUNCTIONS 'Width' ALL BINARY_FILE 'includes_flow\width.dat'
#7 ;############################################################################### ; Eighth input block
INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B8_initials.inc' ; From UI: Initials
#8 ;############################################################################### ; Ninth input block 1 ; Conditions follow in this file 1 ; Monitor-file 0 ; Grid-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B9_Hisvar.inc' ; History-file INCLUDE 'includes_deltashell\B9_Mapvar.inc' ; Map-file ; Binary/Nefis and History/Map 1 ; Switch on binary History file 1 ; Switch on binary Map file 0 ; Switch off Nefis History file 0 ; Switch off Nefis Map file #9 ;############################################################################### ; Tenth input block #10
